name: Security Rules
description: Rules for enhancing security practices in the codebase

rules.name: prevent-secrets
rules.message: Potential secret or credential detected. Consider using environment variables or a secure vault.

rules.name: sql-injection
rules.message: Potential SQL injection vulnerability. Use parameterized queries instead.

rules.name: xss-prevention
rules.message: Potential XSS vulnerability. Consider using safer alternatives like textContent or createElement.
